Welcome to the course nine simulation. You're making great progress through the courseware. In this scenario, you're going to be buying a car. Let's pretend that you're looking to buy a four-door sedan. You arrive at the dealership in the morning and meet Jordan, the car salesperson. After looking around for several hours, you find the perfect car and fall in love with it. This is the car you want. The only issue is it has a price tag of $34,500. Your target price is $27,000. The goal of the simulation is to use the tools we've learned in order to successfully achieve your goal. It's important to remember that building the foundation of trust and rapport is the most important part of any negotiation. Empathy precedes assertion. For this simulation, we'll skip over the empathy building and pretend you've already established a good relationship with Jordan.
